summary: Serverless and dedicated GPU inference for AI teams.
editor_note: The practical bet is inference without the cloud procurement tax. Parasail leads with no quotas, no long contracts, up to 30x lower pricing, and docs for Serverless, Dedicated endpoints, Batch, Responses API, and billing APIs. Compared to renting raw GPU boxes, it sells a model-running surface that can scale from free credits to 500B+ daily tokens. The open question is whether this stays cheaper once the largest clouds copy the packaging.
investors: Touring Capital, Kindred Ventures, Basis Set, Samsung Next

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Parasail: Serverless and dedicated GPU inference for AI teams.
Parasail leads with no quotas, no long contracts, up to 30x lower pricing, and docs for Serverless, Dedicated endpoints, Batch, Responses API, and billing APIs.
